backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing user profiles with access control and performing DCF valuation calculations with input validation and helper functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a UI feature to the affected file, components, test IDs, and confidence level.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of multiple frontend files involved in styling, DCF logic, hooks, and components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining color tokens and theming variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading the main script with metadata and favicon.
frontend/scripts/check-required-generate: Node script verifying required generated image assets exist before building and failing if any are missing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app wiring together DCF inputs, results, actions, hero section, and the LiveSiteSection component.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: Action button group for example input loading, reset, link copying, and optional dev checks.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Form component for Company Snapshot inputs, rendering fields with validation and on-change updates.
frontend/src/components/FormulasDialog.t: Displays all calculated formulas grouped by category, rendering each formula in a card with name, expression, and formatted value.
Manages draft and live site URLs with copy, validation, save, and open actions using local storage and toasts.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: Calculates and animates intrinsic and actual values, displaying results and warnings based on user inputs.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Provides functions to compute hidden values, intrinsic price, and actual value using the formula registry.
frontend/src/features/dcf/devChecks.ts: Runs verification checks comparing calculated intrinsic and actual values against expected outputs with tolerance.
frontend/src/features/dcf/formulas.ts: Implements all DCF-related formulas, safe helpers, and returns a full registry of formula definitions and computed values.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines the DcfInputs interface along with default, example, and verification input presets.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Validates DCF input fields for numeric ranges and whitespace, returning structured errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Provides an animated count‑up hook using requestAnimationFrame with easing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity auth state, login, logout, and identity loading via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Custom hook syncing state with localStorage using JSON serialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Maps DCF inputs to backend format and runs backend DCF calculation via react‑query.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Syncs DCF inputs with URL parameters and generates shareable links.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus custom CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Provides number formatting helpers for currency, large numbers, percentages, and commas.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Utilities for parsing numeric and percent inputs and converting decimals to percent strings.
frontend/src/lib/url.ts: Helpers for validating URLs, copying text to clipboard, and safely opening links.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, QueryClient, and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides functions to read URL parameters, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean hash-based params without reloading the page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom colors, typography, container settings, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Defines the project's metadata, versions, features, and current state configuration.
